title: Ry's Cheap Chains
description: Cheap chains craft using only 2 iron nuggets, making chains more accessible for all your builds.
body:
# Cheap Chain Crafting Datapack ⛓️✨

Tired of spending valuable iron ingots just to craft a few chains? Well, this datapack makes crafting **cheap and easy**! Instead of requiring iron ingots, you can now craft chains using only **2 iron nuggets**. That’s right—no more wasting precious iron for a simple decoration!

# 🛠️ Features
The default chain recipe (which uses iron ingots) is replaced with a cheaper version.
Simply use 2 iron nuggets to craft a chain—because let’s be honest, chains shouldn’t cost more than a full set of iron armor.

![Cheap chains craft in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10b13169a3ecaf1f979903184752df95a4eacf63.png)

The recipe is balanced, so you don’t feel like you’re mining iron just to hang a lantern.

# 🎨 Why Use This Datapack?

  ✅ Affordable Decoration – Build without worrying about iron shortages!\
  ✅ Survival friendly - You can craft chains in your inventory crafting gird.\
  ✅ No More Iron Sacrifices – Keep that iron for tools and armor instead.

## ⚙️ How to Install
1️⃣ Download the datapack.\
2️⃣ Place it in your world’s datapacks folder (.minecraft/saves/[Your World]/datapacks).\
3️⃣ Reload your world (/reload or restart).\
4️⃣ Enjoy your cheap chains!⛓️

## FAQ :
*Can I add this to a pack / project / whatever ?*\
Yes.
